name: Klaviyo
tagline: Marketing automation platform built for e-commerce
description: Klaviyo is a powerful email and SMS marketing platform purpose-built for e-commerce brands. Known for its deep Shopify integration, advanced segmentation, and revenue-focused analytics.
use_cases: Your Shopify store needs abandoned cart, browse abandonment, and post-purchase flows that trigger from real-time storefront behaviour
You want to segment your email list by purchase history, predicted lifetime value, or product category to send genuinely relevant campaigns
Your brand does both email and SMS and wants both channels running from a single automation flow with unified revenue attribution
You're scaling past £1M GMV and need analytics that show exactly how much revenue each flow, segment, and campaign is generating
